title: ReefScale Global Reef Fish Biomass and Management Dataset
abstract: Global compilation of reef fish biomass survey data (belt-transect visual census) linked to socio-economic gravity metrics (travel time to market/population, reserve status, management type) at thousands of coral reef sites worldwide, used for cross-regional benchmarking of Red Sea reef fish biomass against global reef condition gradients.

variables.name: FamBiomass_tkm2
variables.label: Family-level Fish Biomass
variables.description: Total reef fish biomass estimated from belt-transect visual census.

variables.name: HardCoral
variables.label: Hard Coral Cover
variables.description: Percent hard coral cover at the site, where recorded.

variables.name: Grav_tot
variables.label: Total Gravity
variables.description: Combined gravity metric (population and market access weighted by travel time) — a standard predictor of reef fishing pressure.

variables.name: MGMT_type
variables.label: Management Type
variables.description: Site management status (e.g. open access, restricted, no-take reserve).

access.how_to_request: Internal mirror of a global reef survey compilation (methodology consistent with Cinner et al.-style reef fish gravity studies) — confirm original source/license with the team before external sharing.

provenance.originator: Global reef survey compilation (multiple contributing providers per-site; original source not fully documented in this copy)
provenance.license: Unconfirmed — do not redistribute without verifying terms

known_issues: Original citation/source paper not confirmed from the file itself — column structure (Grav_tot, MGMT_type, TT_market_h) strongly resembles published reef-fish-biomass gravity studies but the exact source/DOI needs verification before citing externally.
Global coverage — needs filtering to identify any Red Sea sites specifically.
